name: tide-tables
description: Tide prediction and fishing timing advisor for Alaska coastal waters. Provides tide heights, current predictions, slack tide windows, and fishing-specific timing recommendations based on tide stage and target species.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: tide:today
commands.description: Show today's tide table for a specified location

commands.name: tide:week
commands.description: Show the week's tide predictions with fishing quality ratings

commands.name: tide:best
commands.description: Find the best fishing windows in the next few days based on tide timing and target species

commands.name: tide:slack
commands.description: Show upcoming slack tide windows (prime bottom fishing time)

commands.name: tide:compare
commands.description: Compare tide conditions between two dates or locations
